**僕には年下の幼なじみがいる。親同士も仲が良く両家の親が旅行に行く5日間、幼なじみのよるを僕が預かる事になった。冷たい態度をとるくせに、一人で寝るのが怖いと僕のベッドに入ってきたり、お風呂も1人が怖いし恥ずかしいからとスク水を着ながら混浴してきたり。勝ち気で生意気なんだけど憎めないよるに僕は翻弄されっぱなし！ツンツンしながらエッチな事をしてくるのは好意の裏返し！？主観映像で送るツンデレ同棲生活！**

**I have an annoying and clingy childhood friend who always tries to manipulate me. Our parents are too friendly, and they decided to leave us alone for 5 days. This little brat, despite acting cold and distant, crawls into my bed because they're scared to sleep alone. They also have the audacity to join me in the mixed bath, wearing a revealing swimsuit, just to make me uncomfortable. They think they're so clever and cute, but I see through their tricks! Is this their twisted way of showing affection? Experience the torment of a tsundere cohabitation life through my lens!**
